component.name: PaperLibrary
component.summary: Local PDF and EPUB reader for a personal document library

description.p: PaperLibrary is a local-first reader and library application for PDFs and EPUBs. It provides a macOS-focused shell with Chrome-style tabs, shell-owned QtPdf/PDFium PDF reading, QtWebEngine EPUB reading, library shelves, local metadata, and optional BYO-token local AI hooks.
PaperLibrary is based on KDE Okular and preserves the upstream GPL attribution while replacing the active Okular part and generator runtime with PaperLibrary-owned PDF and EPUB readers.
